resource.name: ErrObjNotDesignable
resource.object: The class {0} doesn't implement IConfigurable and therefore can't be designed

resource.name: ErrNoDefaultCtor
resource.object: The class {0} doesn't have a default constructor and therefore can't be designed

resource.name: colBaseSystemsShName.RequiredFailedMessage
resource.object: Base short name is not correct;

resource.name: colWHSystemContainerRepositoryAssemblyId.RequiredFailedMessage
resource.object: Container repository Assembly is not selected;

resource.name: colWHSystemContainerRepositoryClassname.RequiredFailedMessage
resource.object: Container repository Class is not selected;

resource.name: colWHSystemElementRepositoryAssemblyId.RequiredFailedMessage
resource.object: System Element Repository Assembly is not selected;

resource.name: colWHSystemElementRepositoryClassname.RequiredFailedMessage
resource.object: System Element Repository Class is not selected;

resource.name: PromptDeleteAllTransitDataCaption
resource.object: Delete all data in transit table?

resource.name: PromptDeleteAllTransitData
resource.object: This will delete ALL data in the transit table!\n\nThis should ONLY be done after a system restart where all packs have been removed!

resource.name: repositoryItemsearchText.NullValuePrompt
resource.object: Id of the Container or Pack

resource.name: LogCantClosePalletNoConnectionToServer
resource.object: Не могу закрыть паллету, нет связи с сервером

resource.name: LogCantToggleLocationStatusNoConnectionToServer
resource.object: Не могу изм. статус места, нет связи с сервером

resource.name: PacksInBuffer
resource.object: Эти короба уже были для паллеты

resource.name: LogPalletAssignFailed
resource.object: Не удалось присвоить паллету {0} присвоенную на место {1}: {2}

resource.name: IfPalletIsClosedLaneWillBeCleared
resource.object: Если палета закроется, линия будет очищена

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_ErrorCloningTemplatesSeeLogForDetail
resource.object: Error cloning templates, see log for detail

resource.name: DeleteSingleRow
resource.object: Do you want to delete this row?

resource.name: DeleteMultipleRows
resource.object: Do you want to delete {0} rows

resource.name: ErrorCreatingTemplateLinesOrderlinesCanOnlyBeUsedOnce
resource.object: Error creating template lines, orderlines can only be used once

resource.name: TheTotalAmountForTheTemplateMustNotExceedMaxPalletSizeOn
resource.object: The total amount for the template must not exceed max. pallet size on

resource.name: TheTotalAmountForAllTemplatesWithThisOrderLineMustNotExceedOrderedAmount
resource.object: The total amount for all templates with this orderline must not exceed ordered amount

resource.name: TheMaxForThisLineIs
resource.object: the max. for this line is

resource.name: LogAPackIsAlreadyMovedToReworkLane
resource.object: A Pack is already moved to rework lane

resource.name: APackIsAlreadyAssignedToReworkOverride
resource.object: A pack is already assigned to rework - Override?

resource.name: LogPackNotMovedToReworkLanePackCode
resource.object: Pack not moved to rework lane, pack code

resource.name: LogMovedPackToReworkLanePackCode
resource.object: Moved pack to rework lane, pack code

resource.name: LogMovedPackBackFromReworkLanePackCode
resource.object: Moved pack back from rework lane, pack code

resource.name: NoDestinationCanBeSetForPackCancelThePack
resource.object: No destination can be set for pack. Cancel the pack?

resource.name: LogPackAssignedToPallet
resource.object: Pack assigned to pallet, pack code

resource.name: LogPackNotAssignedToPallet
resource.object: Pack not assigned to pallet, pack code

resource.name: LogNoLongerPossibleToAssignPack
resource.object: No longer possible to assign pack

resource.name: MsgAPackIsAlreadyAssignedToReworkOverride
resource.object: A pack is already assigned to rework - Override?

resource.name: LogCanNotAssignPackToRework
resource.object: Can not assign Pack to Rework

resource.name: DeleteMultipleRows
resource.object: Do you want to delete {0} rows

resource.name: DeleteSingleRow
resource.object: Do you want to delete this row?

resource.name: LogCantToggleLaneStatusNoConnectionToServer
resource.object: Не могу изм. статус линии, нет связи с сервером

resource.name: LogExceptionTogglingLaneStatus
resource.object: Фатальная ошибка при изменении статуса линии: {0}, Сообщение: {1}

resource.name: LogCantClosePalletNoConnectionToServer
resource.object: Нельзя закрыть паллету, нет связи с сервером

resource.name: LogCantForceLaneToPalletNoConnectionToServer
resource.object: Не могу отправить линию на паллету нет связи с сервером

resource.name: DoYouWantToMoveTheBoxesToPalletizing
resource.object: Вы хотите поместить коробки в паллеты?

resource.name: LogExceptionForceLaneToPallet
resource.object: Исключение в отправке Линии(й) на паллету: {0} / {1}, Сообщение: {2}

resource.name: LogCantClearLaneNoConnectionToServer
resource.object: Не могу очистить Линию(и), нет связи с сервером

resource.name: LogExceptionClearLane
resource.object: Фатальная ошибка при очистке линии: {0} / {1}, Сообщение: {2}

resource.name: LogErrorClosingPalletUnitOpFailed
resource.object: Ошибка закрытия паллетыt: {0} / {1}\r\n Номер неудачной операция: {2}

resource.name: LogErrorLanesNotClearedForLocation
resource.object: ОШИБКА - Линии НЕ очищены для места:{0}

resource.name: LogBoxesMovedToPalletizingForLocation
resource.object: Коробки отправлены на паллетирование для места:{0}

resource.name: LogErrorBoxesNotMovedToPalletizingForLocation
resource.object: Ошибка - Коробки НЕ отправлены на паллетирование для места:{0}

resource.name: ThereArePacksInTheStagingLaneForThePallet
resource.object: Коробки на промежуточной линии для паллеты.

resource.name: IfPalletIsClosedLaneWillBeCleared
resource.object: Если паллета закроется, Линия будет очищена

resource.name: FailureToGetNewDestinationForPack
resource.object: No new destination found for pack

resource.name: PackPlanCreatedLogMessage
resource.object: Pack nr. {0} in container {1} to address {2} (material: {3})

resource.name: SelectPackAndConfirm
resource.object: Select pack for tag code and press Confirm button

resource.name: WaitAssigning
resource.object: Please wait, assigning pack to container...

resource.name: WaitSettingLocation
resource.object: Please wait, setting container's location to this station...

resource.name: WaitDeterminingNewDestination
resource.object: Please wait, determining new destination for container...

resource.name: ConfirmPackOrClickSelect
resource.object: Confirm pack for container or press Change to select pack from the list
